announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange that the Board of Directors of the Company at its meeting held July 28, 2015 have considered and approved the Composite Scheme of Arrangement ( Scheme ) between Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited ( TEIL or the Transferor Company ) and Triveni Sugar Limited ( TSL or the Transferee Company ) and Triveni Industries Limited ( TIL or the Resulting Company ) and their respective shareholders and the creditors, on the basis of the recommendations received from the Audit Committee of the Board which has examined the draft Scheme along with the Valuation Report from an Independent Chartered Accountant and accordingly recommended that the said Scheme is in the best interest of the shareholders, creditors and other stakeholders.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI LODR Regulations) - Letter of Offer  dated July 24, 2024 ("LOF") for Open Offer in connection with Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Ltd.'.

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement

announcements.headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.body: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Update on Scheme of Arrangement between Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited and Triveni Industries Limited .

announcements.headline: ESOPs/ESOS/ESPS
announcements.body: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange that under Triveni Employees Stock Option Scheme 2009 (ESOP 2009), 2,00,000 stock options (covering 2,00,000 equity shares of Re. 1/- each of the Company) were granted to certain eligible employees of the Company at an exercise price of Rs. 108.05 per share. Pursuant to a Scheme of Arrangement between the Company and Triveni Turbine Ltd. (TTL), duly sanctioned by the Hon'ble Allahabad High Court vide its Order dated April 19, 2011, the steam turbine business of the Company stood transferred to and vested in TTL. Consequently, the value of options held by the employees has been impacted as post demerger the market price of the Company's equity share has gone down. Keeping into consideration the following factors and in order to protect the rights of the option holders, the Compensation Committee has in its meeting held on March 26, 2013, approved the corporate adjustments to the 1,40,000 outstanding vested stock options in terms of ESOP 2009 read with Scheme of Arrangement and SEBI (ESOS & ESPS) Guidelines, 1999 : (1) Global best practices; (2) Just and reasonable adjustment to the number of options so as to ensure that the fair value of options before and after the corporate action should remain unchanged; (3) Valuation of outstanding options on the basis of option pricing model pre and post demerger (Black Scholes Option Pricing Model); (4) Vesting period and the expected life of the options should be left unaltered as far as possible. The existing outstanding options grantees for 1,40,000 stock options have been granted 17,360 additional options in aggregate and the exercise price has been revised from Rs. 108.50 to Rs. 14/- per option. Consequent upon aforesaid corporate adjustment, as on date total outstanding vested options are 1,57,360, representing 1,57,360 equity shares of Re. 1/- each of the Company.

announcements.headline: Restructuring
announcements.body: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange that in the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company held on November 14, 2014 the Board considered options for restructuring of businesses and auhorized further study.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI LODR Regulations) - Draft Letter of Offer  dated February 12, 2024 ("DLOF") for Open Offer in connection with Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Ltd.'.

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Receipt of Observation Letter with "No Objection" from National Stock Exchange of India Limited in relation to the proposed composite Scheme of Arrangement

announcements.headline: Regulation 44(3) of SEBI (LODR), Reg., 2015
announcements.body: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange that at the Court Convened Meeting (CCM) held on September 03, 2016, approved unanimously the Scheme of Arrangement between the Company, Triveni Engineering & Industries Ltd. (Transferor Company) andTriveni Industries Ltd. (Resulting Company) and their respective shareholders and creditors under Sections 391-394 of the Companies Act, 1956 ( Scheme ) with the following modification proposed at the CCM:-Modification in the Scheme A new sub-clause 17.3 as mentioned below is hereby inserted in Clause 17 of the Scheme 17.3 It is hereby clarified that the Transferor Company and the Resulting Company, through their respective Board of Directors, be and are hereby authorized to take all such steps as may be necessary, desirable and proper to ensure compliance with the applicable notified Accounting Standards and generally accepted accounting principles including accounting standards prescribed under the Companies (Indian Accounting Standards) Rules 2015 ('Applicable Accounting Standards'). It is further clarified that the reference to the book values under this Scheme read with clause 8.2 above, shall mean the values computed in accordance with the Applicable Accounting Standards.

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about Notice of meeting of the Unsecured Creditors of Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited ( Company ) convened as per directions of the National Company Law Tribunal, Allahabad Bench, vide its orders dated 17th October, 2025 and 28th October, 2025 ( NCLT Convened Meeting ) in the matter of the Composite Scheme of Arrangement amongst Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited ( Company ), Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Limited and Triveni Power Transmission Limited and their respective shareholders and creditors.

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about Notice of meeting of the Secured Creditors of Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited ( Company ) convened as per directions of the National Company Law Tribunal, Allahabad Bench, vide its orders dated 17th October, 2025 and 28th October, 2025 ( NCLT Convened Meeting ) in the matter of the Composite Scheme of Arrangement amongst Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited ( Company ), Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Limited and Triveni Power Transmission Limited and their respective shareholders and creditors.
